mapper.sql:
AND USE_YN = TRUE
AND MEMBER_SEQ IN (0, #{memberSeq})
AND MEMBER_SEQ = 0

CATEGORY_SEQ /**/ , MEMBER_SEQ /**/ , (MEMBER_SEQ = 0) AS defaultCategory , NAME /**/ , EMOJI /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/
